name: White Bridge
short_description: White Bridge is a blend of role playing game and classic JRPG. It offers an immersive world for the players to explore and interact with. Choose the way you will deal with people and change the outcome of how they treat you.
detailed_description:
White Bridge is a blend of role playing game and classic JRPG.
It offers an immersive world for the players to explore and interact with.
Choose the way you will deal with people and change the outcome
of how they treat you.

Bob is gifted a farm just outside of the town known as White Bridge
and immediately begins as an undercover agent for Richter Stormfront of the adventure Guild.
Richter tasks him to investigate the local church which he suspects is up to no good.

Players will develop their character's powers, interact with other creatures and embark
on story-driven quests as they battle NPC's and monsters with an incredible array of
powers and weaponry.

*No random encounters

*Nearly ALL conflict is avoidable

*Choices matter forming different outcomes for your play through

*Customize your characters attributes

*Veteran Experience for alternate leveling

*Robust Main Story with abundance of Side Quests

*Interactive World

*Trade skills- Mining, fishing, crafting, alchemy.
